title: Marinescu's Cloud Security Layered Defense
description: A visual representation of the multi-layered security approach for cloud computing as conceptualized by Dan C. Marinescu, showing the hierarchy of security measures from the physical infrastructure up to the application level.
relationships: Physical Infrastructure is secured to protect the Network Layer
Network Layer enforces security for the Virtualization Layer
Virtualization Layer provides isolation for the Application/OS Layer
Application/OS Layer access is controlled by IAM
Data Layer is encrypted and protected by all underlying layers
CSP Operations manage and monitor all security layers
